auditFindings.finding: 48 local files have source-path provenance and type classification.
auditFindings.control: Every normalized record carries source path, fiscal year, agency, source type, and extraction timestamp.

auditFindings.finding: 4,355 award rows need recipient enrichment across 4 parsed CSV files.
auditFindings.control: Recipient and agency fields are profiled during local ingestion before Neon load.

auditFindings.finding: 654 negative obligation actions are candidates for variance explanation.
auditFindings.control: Exception queue links deobligations to spend-plan variance and award closeout review.

auditFindings.finding: 42 PDF/XLSX files are inventoried and queued for deeper text/table extraction.
auditFindings.control: Document parser backlog is tracked with fiscal year, agency, and document type metadata.

intelligenceItems.title: DoD budget-book corpus ready for budget formulation lab
intelligenceItems.summary: 2 structured budget books and 28 PDFs are available for fiscal-year comparisons and source-grounded summaries.

intelligenceItems.title: USAspending award extracts provide obligation and counterparty baseline
intelligenceItems.summary: 17,078 transactions/subawards are parsed, with Missing recipient currently the highest-frequency named counterparty.

intelligenceItems.title: Neon schema can be loaded after local parser hardening
intelligenceItems.summary: The app exposes typed local APIs first, then can persist source_documents, budget_lines, award_transactions, audit_findings, and financial_anomalies.
